input.content: Navigate to the lead Colleen Anderson and log a note with the content: 'Intro call completed. Prospect evaluating internally.'
Open the lead Emily Novak (emilyn.novak@crestunifiedfoods.com) and update the job title to Senior VP of Marketing. Leave all other fields unchanged.

I am a Sales Operations Manager preparing for a manual outreach cleanup. Before launching a new campaign, the team needs visibility into contacts that have never been engaged so they can be reviewed and assigned appropriately. Create a new static list named “Never Contacted” that includes all contacts who have never been contacted. Save the list.

Show me all contacts that have not had any engagement (no emails opened, clicks, or logged activities) in the last 30 days. Provide a short summary of how many contacts match this and suggest what to do next.
Analyze engagement data from recent campaigns. Recommend the best day and time to schedule future outreach emails, explaining how engagement metrics support your choice.
